title: Elytra toggle
description: This mod allows you to deactivate your elytra while flying by simply pressing the spacebar.
body:
# Elytra toggle
This mod allows you to disable the elytra while flying by simply pressing the spacebar. The mod was created because the existing elytra toggle mod is only available on NeoForge up to version 1.21.1.

## Credits
- You can use this mod without mentioning it.
- You can make forks of this mod
- This mod was made with MCreator (2025.2, 2025.3)

## Usage
If you wanna use this mod, i recommend you to download the latest version of it. You can use it in singleplayer or on a server (both client and server side).


### **This isn't a final version of this mod!**
